risk.desc: Potential misalignment of bolted interfaces due to manufacturing tolerances.
risk.mit: Implement tighter tolerance control during manufacturing and assembly.

risk.desc: Risk of thermal stress on LPBF parts due to rapid cooling.
risk.mit: Implement thermal management strategies during post-processing.

risk.desc: Risk of cable damage due to inadequate strain relief geometry.
risk.mit: Ensure all cable exits have appropriate strain relief features.

risk.desc: Risk of mis-mating connectors due to lack of keying or labeling.
risk.mit: Ensure all connectors are labeled and keyed to prevent mis-mating.

risk.desc: Risk of structural integrity issues due to non-functional components.
risk.mit: Conduct regular inspections and maintenance checks on display components.

risk.mit: Include strain relief features and specify minimum bend radius.
